title: Human IFN?/Granzyme B Dual Color ELISpot
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"epm8q","text":"This protocol describes the preparation and use of ELISpot 96 well plates for measuring human IFNγ and Granzyme B production by immune cells (notably CD4 and CD8 T cells). Cells harvested from peripheral blood or other organs can be used, stimulated with antigen of interest (usually between 18 to 24h), and per cell production of IFNγ and Granzyme B measured as a ‘spot’ on a plate well membrane (http://www.immunospot.eu/advantage-of-immunospot-kits.html).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":398,"length":58}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B9F4D9DD2A6449B2B99A517FFC723E28","url":"http://www.immunospot.eu/advantage-of-immunospot-kits.html"}}}}
creator: Miloje Savic
